import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-landing', templateUrl: './landing.component.html', styleUrls: ['./landing.component.css'] }) export class LandingComponent { }

Intelligent Task Allocator

A smart, minimalistic solution for seamless enterprise task assignment, project tracking, and employee utilization.

📊

Smart Allocation

Automatically distribute tasks based on employee skills and availability to maximize efficiency.

📈

Project Tracking

Monitor project progress in real-time, identify bottlenecks early, and ensure timely delivery.

👥

Employee Utilization

Gain insights into workload distribution to prevent burnout and optimize team performance.
